series_metadata.series_description: This series contains documents generally associated with the various education events (programs, presentations, courses, or activities) conducted or funded by the Division of Parks and Watercraft for water safety education, including but not limited to: course materials, education logs, liability waivers, reports of audience and sponsors, pamphlets, 45-day temporary certificates, batch records, duplicate requests, requests for student/course materials, textbooks, and lesson plans. The educational records cover various subjects, such as safe boating and water/ice safety.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: event ; Paper: event. If paper copies are scanned into an electronic format, paper copy may be destroyed at that time
